title: retiniphyllum pilosum
intro: Retiniphyllum pilosum, also known as the hairy retiniphyllum, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Retiniphyllum pilosum include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds and skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves, stems, or roots in hot water or a solvent.
